name: gcp-platform-engineering-portfolio
title: GCP Platform Engineering Showcase
description: A production-style delivery path from source control to a secure GKE workload, covering Terraform, GitOps, CI/CD, security, and observability.

name: cicd-pipeline-jenkins-terraform-ansible-k8s
title: Cloud-Native CI/CD Platform Pipeline
description: A runnable pipeline where Jenkins builds containerized services, Terraform defines GKE, and Ansible, Kustomize, and Istio deliver secured workloads.

name: gcp-cloud-engineering-portfolio
title: GCP Cloud Engineering Skill Portfolio
description: An indexed set of hands-on projects covering IAM, VPC, Compute Engine, GKE, Terraform, Helm, Istio, observability, and SRE incident management on GCP.

name: ansible-hands-on-projects
title: Ansible Hands-On Projects
description: Idempotent playbooks for Linux hardening, Docker host setup, GCP VM bootstrap, Kubernetes admin tooling, and Prometheus monitoring agents.

name: github-actions-hands-on-projects
title: GitHub Actions CI/CD Projects
description: Copy-ready GitHub Actions workflows for Docker/Cloud Run deploys, Terraform validation, Kubernetes manifest checks, and dependency/secret scanning.

name: python-gcp-automation-toolkit
title: Python GCP Automation Toolkit
description: Five production-oriented cloud operations tools packaged as a Click CLI and FastAPI service for GKE health, IAM auditing, and automation workflows.

name: ai-mock-interviewer
title: AI Mock Interviewer
description: Voice-led AI interview practice for DevOps, SRE, cloud, platform engineering, MLOps, and software engineering roles.

name: gcp-mlops-pipeline-showcase
title: GCP MLOps Pipeline on GKE
description: An end-to-end model lifecycle using Vertex AI, MLflow, FastAPI, GKE, KServe, Prometheus, Pub/Sub, and Cloud Run.

name: mlops-ollama-incident-copilot
title: MLOps Ollama Incident Copilot
description: An incident-risk ML service with infrastructure telemetry, model observability, and local Ollama-generated SRE remediation guidance.

name: genai-hands-on-projects
title: GenAI Hands-On Projects
description: Runnable GenAI labs including a RAG knowledge API, prompt-safety gateway, meeting summarizer, and prompt evaluation notebook with local fallbacks.

name: aiops-hands-on-projects
title: AIOps Hands-On Projects
description: Operational AI labs for anomaly detection, alert correlation, SLO burn-rate analysis, incident prediction, and safe remediation simulation.

name: interview-quiz-app
title: Engineering Interview Quiz
description: A Python/Flet study application with flashcards and multiple-choice practice spanning Kubernetes, GCP, Terraform, Docker, MLOps, and GenAI.

name: mlops-zoomcamp
title: MLOps Zoomcamp Work
description: Practical notebooks and exercises covering the machine-learning lifecycle and MLOps engineering workflows.
